programmes.show_description: Detectives in the Incident Room must work tirelessly to find and bring to justice four ruthless teens who killed 63-year-old Gurmail Singh in his Huddersfield corner shop.
Dr Eleanor Beecraft fears her patient is in the middle of a drugs overdose. Dr William Laird must convince a depressed man that life is worth living.
A man named Terry, who fell off a roof and is seriously injured, needs help. A man named Jeff is brought in by ambulance after his car flipped onto its side.
There's a huge and very messy back cyst for Dr Adil Sheraz, Dr Toby Nelson treats a cheeky patient, and Dr Dev Shah meets a roofer with nine lives. (Ep5)
Challengers 'Brahms & Liszt Challenge' take on the mighty Eggheads, aiming to win the rolling prize fund.

...the Sun. New series. Gill launches her B&B goat farm trips, Shani plans birthday surprises for Laurie, and drag act duo Will and Steve trade the stage for the salsa dance floor.
...the Sun. New series. Andy and Becky plan their wedding in Benidorm, Ian gives his first guided tour, and Colin welcomes Margaret the pig in sunny Spain.
A woman uses the old "I was just making a call" excuse to avoid paying for goods, and a London team dealing with shoplifting and anti-social behaviour handle a disruptive gang. (Ep18)
Observational documentary series. Cops from North and West Yorkshire are cracking down on uninsured drivers whose recklessness is a cost to all of us.
The cops deal with a suicidal man with mental health problems, an Eritrean woman dumped out of a lorry by people traffickers, and a lass who's had a barney with her boyfriend.
In Leeds the cops are on the look out for a stolen Ford Fiesta; their hunt ending in a dramatic foot chase pursuing one of the mouthiest criminals they've ever seen.
A car thief careers across Mark's path, and the interceptors engage in a high-speed pursuit through Lincoln city centre.
Documentary series following the high-speed law-enforcement specialists of Lincolnshire. Jon Peacock comes across a half-naked man out on the streets in the middle of winter.
The interceptors track down a driver who has given him the slip in the side roads of Spalding, and there's a report of a dead body in Lincolnshire's waterways.

programmes.show_name: Car Pound Cops: Give Me My Car...
programmes.show_description: ...Back! Specialist car recovery companies help local governments and businesses take care of illegal or dangerous vehicles by getting them off the road.
Eden's crushed by Remi's news. Mali questions Holden's motives. Cash and Levi are in the doghouse.
Does Kerrie deserve a goodbye? Sonny's confronted by his new life. Mali sees through Holden.
The police neighbourhood teams get to grips with criminals holed up in a smart suburban semi, a firearm at a local charity and a drug dealer making a run for it. (Ep4)

programmes.show_name: Call the Bailiffs: Time to Pay Up!
programmes.show_description: Mark and Sam trail a debtor who owes more than £20k for an unpaid invoice - but they are wary at the address as the property has an associated firearms licence and a big dog.

programmes.show_name: Fare Dodgers: At War with the Law
programmes.show_description: At Vauxhall station, one of the capital's fare-dodging ultra-hot spots, a team of six revenue protection officers set a trap to block rush-hour fare dodgers.
Shocking series that looks at tenants who are every landlords worst nightmare.
A speeding car knocks down an 81-year-old cyclist at a crossing. With news that the victim has died, an investigation turns into a hunt for the deceased's killer.
Dog handler Jon is forced to wrestle with a drunken man, Dan has an early-morning meeting with a drink-driver and a wine-loving shoplifter gets his just desserts.
A violent man wreaks havoc in a hospital and the driver of a stolen VW Beetle rewrites the highway code.
Documentary series. A routine check on a car uncovers suspected drug dealing, a runaway cow causes problems and a wanted petrol thief's stealing spree comes to a halt.
The "Lower League Lads" challenge the Eggheads for the prize.
The Eggheads find themselves quizzing against "The Mighty Wanderers."
The "Baize Brains" eye the rolling prize pool as they face the Eggheads.

...the Sun. New series. Chefs Mark and Terri test a cooking class, Susie braves floods at her dog rescue, and Beckii and Simon throw a second birthday party for miracle son Huntley.
Debbie and Jude juggle DIY and music, Nigel leads a fancy dress parade tour, and newlyweds Ellie and Jim open a cafe in Spain. Will they all hit the right note?
Private detectives Steve and Adam are on the case of a prolific thief. Tom and Vasim get an SOS: a suspected offender has entered premises and is known to be quick on his feet. (Ep19)
The cops have their hands full with night time drink driving incidents. Four police cars are needed to stop a car with a motorbike hanging out of the boot.
There's a four car collision outside a primary school, and a speeding driver, desperate to escape, smashes into traffic at a junction, causing carnage before escaping on foot.
Observational documentary series. The cops are called to a fatal accident near a theme park, where they suspect the driver responsible for the crash has been using drugs.
Observational documentary series. The dog unit embark on a desperate manhunt amid fears that a weapon-wielding brawler is roaming the streets of Lincoln.
As storms batter the UK, the chopper team face a race against time to rescue a woman trapped by rising river water.
A high-speed pursuit takes the officers off-road, a routine stop provides the interceptors with some tasty results and a tracker activation turns into a major haul.

Does Kerrie deserve a goodbye? Sonny's confronted by his new life. Mali sees through Holden.
Kerrie has a final surprise for Tane. Dana refuses to give up without a fight. Archie's family come together.
Two recently treated patients return seeking more urgent help from the hard-pressed doctors.
Paramedics take Shaun, 53, to resus after he collapses at home following multiple seizures. And Margaret, 94, has a high heart rate and dangerously low oxygen levels.
An elderly man is in dire straits after being run over by a motorcycle. A man struggles after being stabbed multiple times, including in the neck.
High-octane medical emergencies include a man found collapsed in a hotel room, a head-on collision between two motorcyclists, and an 11-year-old who's taken a tumble from his scooter.
Both Dr Emma McMullen and Dr Adil Sheraz need a wipe down after dealing with cysts, Dr Toby Nelson has a lipoma named after him, and Dr Natalia Spierings performs a mole removal.
